metadata.name: Greentic Platform Primitives
metadata.summary: Canonical node-type descriptors for editor primitives the platform itself owns
metadata.description: Ships the start nodeType — the only structural primitive the platform itself owns. Webhook trigger moved to `greentic.webhook` in 0.2.0; the generic LLM nodeType moved to `greentic.llm-generic` in 0.3.0. Other extensions specialise these over time — provider extensions can register their own trigger types (slack-trigger, teams-trigger, …) and llm-specific extensions can register typed LLM nodes (greentic.llm-openai, …) — but the editor always has a baseline. Pure metadata extension: no tools, no schemas, no prompts, no knowledge.
